name: workload-failure-diagnoser
description: Diagnose CCE workload rollout failures, stuck rolling updates, unavailable replicas, and probe-related readiness failures.

tools.name: huawei_workload_rollout_diagnose
tools.description: Run huawei_workload_rollout_diagnose through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
